initiatives.name: Centro del Pueblo
initiatives.description: United for the empowerment of the Indigenous Migrant Peoples and Latinx communities.

initiatives.name: Humboldt for Palestine
initiatives.description: Abolitionist, anti-imperialist organizing collective dedicated to the total liberation of Palestine, from the river to the sea.

initiatives.name: Humboldt Area Center for Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: In addition to our harm reduction supply kits, our services include syringe access, naloxone training and distribution, linkage to low barrier Medication Assisted Treatment, case management, and basic needs support.
